requirements.task_name: Bookmark three weekend tree-planting events in June 2025 within 25 miles
requirements.task_description: Find local tree-planting events happening on Saturdays or Sundays in June 2025 within 25 miles of ZIP code 94110, and bookmark exactly three of them to your saved events list.

requirements.task_name: Create a low-cost conservation action plan with 5 high-impact actions
requirements.task_description: Use the action planner to build a personal conservation plan that includes exactly 5 actions, each with an estimated monthly cost of $50 or less and an impact score of at least 3 out of 5, then save the plan with a specific name.

requirements.task_name: Set a carbon footprint reduction goal of at least 20% for a 3-person household
requirements.task_description: Use the carbon calculator for a 3-person household, generate a baseline annual carbon footprint, then create and save a reduction goal that targets at least a 20% decrease from the baseline.

requirements.task_name: Start a monthly wildlife conservation pledge under $30 with high transparency
requirements.task_description: Select a wildlife conservation project that has a transparency rating of at least 4 out of 5 and a default suggested monthly donation of $30 or less, then set up a recurring monthly pledge of $25 to that project using the on-site pledge form.

requirements.task_name: Register for an evening ocean conservation webinar within the next 60 days
requirements.task_description: Find an ocean conservation webinar scheduled to start after 5:00 PM local time within the next 60 days and register for it, adding it to your on-site events dashboard.

requirements.task_name: Save four recent short plastic pollution articles to a reading list
requirements.task_description: Search for beginner-friendly articles about plastic pollution published in the last 2 years with an estimated reading time of 10 minutes or less, and add exactly four of them to a new reading list.

requirements.task_name: Join a local wildlife volunteer group within 10 miles with 4+ star reviews
requirements.task_description: Find and join a local wildlife-focused volunteer group that is located within 10 miles of ZIP code 30309 and has an average user rating of at least 4 out of 5 stars, then set your preferred participation frequency to weekly.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever searchVolunteerGroups is called and the filters argument includes a postal_code and a max_distance_miles value (i.e., filters && filters.postal_code is truthy and filters.max_distance_miles is not null or undefined).
required_variables.value_to_set: { "postal_code": filters.postal_code || null, "max_distance_miles": filters.max_distance_miles != null ? filters.max_distance_miles : null, "min_average_rating": filters.min_average_rating != null ? filters.min_average_rating : null, "focus_areas": Array.isArray(filters.focus_areas) ? filters.focus_areas : [] }
required_variables.reason: Capture the last volunteer-group search parameters so the evaluator can verify that the user searched with ZIP code '30309', a maximum distance of 10 miles, a minimum rating of at least 4 stars, and a wildlife-related focus area before joining a group. This enables correctness checks for the 'within 10 miles of ZIP 30309 with 4+ star reviews' requirements without altering existing behavior.

requirements.task_name: Activate three easy daily energy-saving challenges from the lifestyle quiz
requirements.task_description: Complete the lifestyle quiz and, based on the results, activate at least three daily challenges that are labeled as 'Easy' difficulty and belong to the 'Energy Saving' category.
